analysis_result: MPNST vs benign NF p=0.00668; MPNST vs atypical NF p=0.01245
discrepancy_analysis: Reported result 'p < 0.05' is consistent with model-reproduced t-test p-values (MPNST vs benign NF p=0.00668; MPNST vs atypical NF p=0.01245). Both pairwise comparisons yield p-values below the 0.05 threshold claimed in the paper, confirming statistical significance. CONCORDANT.
